Note 5 Sufficient Statistics（十分統計量） 復習 統計量 Exponential family Likelihood Three Principles of data reduction Sufficiency principle Likelihood principal Equivariance principle Formal sufficiency principle Conditional principle Formal likelihood principal Formal likelihood principal corollary 5.1 Sufficiency Principle (pp.272~) Principle 5.1.1 Sufficient statistics 十分統計量 定義 5.1.1.1 Sufficient Statisticsに関する定理 例：Binomial, Normal, Order statistics 5.1.1.2 Factorization Theorem 分解定理 例：Normal, Uniform, Normal considering 2 parameters 5.1.1.3 Exponential family に関する定理 5.1.2 Minimal sufficient statistics 最小十分統計量 定義 例：Normal 5.1.2.1 Minimal Sufficient Statisticsに関する定理 例：Normal, Uniform 5.1.3 Ancillary Statistics 補助統計量 定義 例：Uniform, Location family, Scale family 5.1.4 Complete Statistics 完全統計量 Sufficient, Ancillary, Complete の定義 Complete Statistics定義 例：Binomial, Uniform 5.1.4.1 Basu’s Theorem (Ancillary Statistics \(\bot\) Complete and minimal sufficient Statistics) 5.1.4.2 定理（Exponential family） 例：\(E(g(\bf X))\), \(\bar X\bot S^2\) 5.1.4.3 定理（Complete Statistics \(\rightarrow\) Minimal sufficient statistics） 5.2 Likelihood Principle 5.2.1 Likelihood function 定義 例：Negative Binomial 5.2.1.1 Likelihood Principle 尤度原理 例：Normal fiducial dist. 5.2.1.2 Evidence function* Formal sufficiency principle Conditional principle Binomial, negative binomial Formal likelihood principle Likleihood principle corollary Birnbaum’ theorem 例 5.3 Equivariance Principle 同変原則* Equivarianceの定義 Measurement equivariance 測定同変性, formal invariance 形式的不変性 Equivariance Principle Binomial 5.3.1 A group of transformation* 例 5.3.2 Invariant under the group* Normal location invariant 5.4 応用 MLE, Bayesian Inference Constructing Unbiased Estimators Uniformly better unbiased estimator (Rao-Blackwell Theorem, pp. 342) Likelihood ratio test Location-Scale family
